label: Architect: Plan
description: Translate a discovery artifact + chosen recipe into an ordered, deterministic plan. Stage 2-3 of an architect run.

inputs.label: Discovery artifact path
inputs.description: Path to the discovery.md / discovery.json produced by Stage 1.

inputs.label: Recipe id (with optional @version)
inputs.description: Recipe selected by the operator. Architect rejects recipes that don't match surfaces or operator level.

inputs.label: Recipe inputs
inputs.description: JSON object with the input slots required by the recipe.

inputs.label: Diff mode
inputs.description: create-only | upsert | reconcile. Defaults to upsert.

completion.notes: Summarize the recipe chosen, the operation count, irreversible operations flagged, and any conflicts that need operator review.

progress.notes: Report after mapping is resolved and again after plan is materialized.

templates.dispatch: [System] Execute: You are Stage 2-3 of architect run {{input.run_id}}. Resolve recipe `{{input.recipe_id}}` against the discovery at {{input.discovery_artifact}} with the inputs in {{input.recipe_inputs}}. Output: {{artifacts.primary.path}} + plan.json + mapping.md.
templates.resume: [System] The daemon restarted. Continue architect plan task {{task.id}} from where you stopped. Run id: {{input.run_id}}.
templates.dispatchSummary: Plan stage started for architect run {{input.run_id}} using recipe {{input.recipe_id}}.
